# .github

## Purpose
Contains GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions for building, testing, and publishing the library.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions workflow files (see `workflows/AGENTS.md`) |
